subcodes.first_line: This is a glorious Book sent down from the presence of One Who is All-Knowing, All-Wise. Verily, it is the Remembrance of God amidst the worlds and His Most Exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب کریم نزل من لدن علیم حکیم انه لذکر الله بین العالمین و کلمه العلیا
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
